summary: Iteration 16 - Major landing page overhaul with new pricing grid and trial logic. All 18 requested features verified working. Landing page with OLED black design, Hero with '14 jours d'essai gratuit' badge, Pain/e-CMR section, Bento Grid features (IA Anti-Litige, Tracking, Éco-Score, e-CMR), Pricing grid with monthly/annual toggle showing correct prices (Solo 49€/39€, Croissance 149€/119€, Flotte Pro 499€/399€), 'Le choix des leaders' badge on Croissance. Backend returns subscription_status and trial_ends_at fields. Admin and driver dashboards working (regression passed).

Hero H1 contains 'Chaque minute, votre trésorerie fuit. Reprenez le contrôle.' (data-testid='hero-h1') - PASS

Hero has 'Voir la démo' secondary button (data-testid='hero-demo-btn') - PASS

3 plan cards: Solo 49€, Croissance 149€, Flotte Pro 499€ (data-testid='plan-solo', 'plan-croissance', 'plan-flotte_pro') - PASS
Croissance has 'Le choix des leaders' badge (data-testid='popular-badge') - PASS
Annual toggle shows: Solo 39€, Croissance 119€, Flotte Pro 399€ with strikethrough old prices - PASS
Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns updated prices (solo 49, croissance 149, flotte_pro 499) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns subscription_status and trial_ends_at fields - PASS
Admin dashboard still works (regression) - PASS
Driver dashboard still works (regression) - PASS
Register page shows only 'Transporteur' and 'Client' options (no 'Chauffeur') - PASS
Hero CTA navigates to /register - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx: Well-structured with Hero (14 jours badge, gradient H1), Pain section (e-CMR signature), Bento Grid features (4 cards), PricingSection with toggle. All data-testid attributes present.
PricingSection: Custom toggle component (not shadcn) with state management for monthly/annual. Shows strikethrough old prices when annual selected.
server.py: SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS updated with correct prices (solo 49/39, croissance 149/119, flotte_pro 499/399). get_current_user returns subscription_status and trial_ends_at fields.
Multi-tenancy and fleet quotas from iteration 15 still working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 completed major landing page overhaul. Key features: 1) Hero section with '14 jours d'essai gratuit — Aucune carte bancaire requise' badge, gradient H1 'Chaque minute, votre trésorerie fuit. Reprenez le contrôle.', CTA 'Démarrer mon essai gratuit' → /register. 2) Pain section with e-CMR signature H2. 3) Bento Grid features: IA Anti-Litige (large), Tracking & e-CMR Live (small), Éco-Score Chauffeur (small), Génération e-CMR & Factur-X (wide). 4) Pricing grid with monthly/annual toggle: Solo 49€/39€, Croissance 149€/119€ with 'Le choix des leaders' badge, Flotte Pro 499€/399€. Annual shows strikethrough old prices. 5) Backend: /api/subscription/plans returns updated prices, /api/auth/me returns subscription_status and trial_ends_at. Multi-tenancy and fleet quotas from iteration 15 still working.
